task: R-1 - Public/private boundary and CMS route protection
decision: R-1 source implementation complete; production verification still required after deploy.
securityInvariant: Public-site builds must not mount CMS, admin, PWA, account, customer, or booking-management private interfaces for unauthenticated public routes. Protected routes must resolve to a safe not-found state or host-level 404 before private UI renders.

routePolicy.summary: Centralizes private route detection and production public-site blocking. Dev, standalone PWA deploys, and explicit VITE_ENABLE_PRIVATE_APP_ROUTES=true builds can serve private app routes.

siteRouter.summary: Checks shouldBlockPrivateAppRoute before CMS/PWA/account/customer route dispatch and sends blocked paths to the safe not-found state.

bootstrap.summary: Prevents /pwa and installed-PWA CMS bootstrap from mounting the CMS PWA runtime unless private routes are explicitly allowed.

hostRules.summary: Adds explicit protected-route safe-404 rules before SPA fallback, no-store/noindex/noarchive headers, and a static noindex 404 page.

verificationScript.summary: Verifies protected route rules, header blocks, static 404 metadata, app route dispatch guard, and PWA bootstrap guard.

localBrowserSmoke.evidence: Rendered not-found page; title Sivua ei loytynyt | Mitra Auto; no CMS login/admin/PWA text detected.
Rendered not-found page; no CMS PWA login text detected after bootstrap guard.
Rendered not-found page; no private customer/account UI detected.
Public service route still rendered with expected service title.

verification.command: /Users/chandler/.codex/skills/distill-heavy-output/scripts/distill_cmd.sh "Return only: pass/fail, build output directory, warnings/errors count, and any fatal error lines for the Mitra Auto Vite build after the R-1 bootstrap guard patch. Do not include repetitive chunk lists." -- npm run build
verification.note: Build passed with the existing large-chunk warning.

verification.command: test -f build/404.html && test -f build/_redirects && test -f build/_headers && rg -n "^/cms /404\.html 404|^/pwa /404\.html 404|^/customer-account /404\.html 404|X-Robots-Tag: noindex, nofollow, noarchive" build/_redirects build/_headers build/404.html
npx vite preview --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173 plus Playwright browser smoke for /cms, /pwa, /customer-account, and /palvelut/autohuolto

remainingProofGaps: Production deployment has not been updated in this run.
Live www status still needs post-deploy verification for protected routes returning 401, 403, or safe 404.
Hosting provider must honor the protected-route rules or enforce equivalent Cloudflare Access/Worker/provider routing before the SPA fallback.
nextRecommendedWork: Continue with R-2 - Figma Make source sync and preview verification, then R-3 - Production static SEO assets and Merchant feed deployment parity.
